raw_cv_text:
Valentina Karinsky
+44 7911 445823 | Email: valentina.karinsky@gmail.com | LinkedIn: valentina-karinsky | GitHub: ValentinaKarinsky |
https://valentina.dev
EDUCATION
Technical University of Munich (TUM) | MSc Computer Science 2017-2019
Thesis on distributed systems optimization: reduced latency by 34% in horizontally-scaled
microservice architectures
GPA 3.8/4.0; completed specialization in Cloud Computing and Infrastructure Engineering
National University of Sofia | BSc Information Technology 2013-2017
Graduated top 8% of cohort; focus on systems programming and network infrastructure
Led systems administration labs for 150+ students; designed curriculum for containerization concepts
EXPERIENCE
Cloudflare | Senior Site Reliability Engineer 2022-present
Led infrastructure modernization initiative serving 200M+ daily requests; migrated 40+
microservices to Kubernetes, reducing deployment time by 67%
Designed and implemented multi-region disaster recovery system with 99.99% uptime SLA; reduced
RTO from 4h to 12min across 8 data centers
Mentored team of 5 junior SREs; established runbook automation reducing MTTR by 45% on critical
incidents
HashiCorp | Infrastructure Engineer 2020-2022
Architected Terraform state management infrastructure supporting 500+ enterprise clients;
implemented consistency checks reducing deployment errors by 89%
Optimized Consul cluster operations across AWS, Azure, GCP; reduced cloud infrastructure costs by
$2.1M annually through auto-scaling policies
Built CI/CD pipeline using Vault for secrets rotation; achieved zero-knowledge secret distribution
across 1200+ nodes
Stripe | SRE (Platform Infrastructure) 2018-2020
Managed Kubernetes platform serving $100B+ annual payment volume; implemented automated
capacity planning reducing over-provisioning waste by 38%
Designed distributed tracing system using Jaeger; identified and resolved 12 critical latency
bottlenecks in payment processing pipeline
Led on-call rotation covering 24/7 incident response; achieved 99.98% API availability maintaining
SLA commitments across all regions
Wise (formerly TransferWise) | Junior DevOps Engineer 2017-2018
Automated infrastructure provisioning on AWS using Terraform; reduced manual deployment steps
from 47 to 3, cutting deployment time from 90min to 8min
Built monitoring dashboards with Prometheus and Grafana for 30+ microservices; implemented
alerting reducing mean-time-to-awareness by 52%
Contributed to Kubernetes migration project; containerized legacy payment processing service,
improving release frequency from monthly to weekly
PROJECTS
CloudShield - Multi-Cloud Security Orchestration | Terraform, Kubernetes, Vault, Python, 2023
AWS/GCP
Built automated security compliance framework for 3 cloud providers; reduced security audit time
from 3 weeks to 2 days through policy-as-code
Implemented 650+ infrastructure policy checks; caught 87% of misconfigurations before deployment,
preventing 4+ production incidents
ObserveFlow - Real-time Infrastructure Analytics | Prometheus, ClickHouse, Go, Apache Kafka,2022
React
Engineered high-throughput metrics pipeline processing 50M+ data points/minute with <100ms
query latency at 99th percentile
Enabled 120+ engineers across company to debug infrastructure issues 5x faster; reduced incident
investigation time from avg 45min to 9min
RegionSync - Cross-Datacenter State Management | etcd, gRPC, Rust, Docker, PostgreSQL 2021
Designed state consistency layer supporting eventual consistency model across 15 regions; achieved
sub-second convergence with 99.97% accuracy
Reduced data replication bandwidth by 72% through intelligent compression; saved $340K annually
in egress costs
AlertXL - Intelligent Incident Correlation Engine | Python, Machine Learning, Elasticsearch, 2020
Kafka, FastAPI
Developed ML-based alert deduplication system reducing alert noise by 68%; on-call engineers
reported 46% improvement in mean-time-to-resolution
Processed 2.3M alerts/day with 94% precision in root-cause clustering; prevented alert fatigue across
80+ person engineering team
EXTRACURRICULAR
Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF) | Kubernetes Maintainer (Release Team) 2021-present
Oversee testing and validation for quarterly Kubernetes releases; coordinate quality assurance across
40+ volunteer contributors worldwide
Published 8 technical RFCs on container orchestration patterns; speaker at KubeCon EU 2022, 2023
reaching 3,500+ attendees
Infrastructure Engineering Meetup - Berlin | Co-organizer & Speaker 2020-present
Grew meetup from 120 to 890 active members; organized 24 technical talks covering observability,
infrastructure automation, and incident management
Mentored 15 junior engineers transitioning into SRE roles through structured 12-week program with
92% completion rate
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – Go, Python, Rust, Bash, SQL
Technologies – Kubernetes, Terraform, Prometheus, Docker, AWS, GCP, Azure, Kafka, gRPC, etcd,
PostgreSQL, Elasticsearch, Vault, Consul, Jaeger
Tools – Git, GitHub, GitLab, Jenkins, ArgoCD, Grafana, PagerDuty, DataDog, ELK Stack, Jira,
Confluence
